use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Show author or commenter avatars alongside content
Display team member or employee photos in organizational views
Render seller or buyer avatars in marketplace listings
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based Avatar component for displaying user profile images with automatic fallback to a muted background when images fail to load. Includes AvatarImage for the picture and AvatarFallback for graceful degradation, built with React forward refs and Tailwind CSS utility classes for consistent circular user representation across applications.
